sub_modules.fp_hpf_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient ROM that packs the 101 IEEE-754 high-pass FIR coefficient words into a coefficient bus.
sub_modules.fp_fir_dot_product: Combinational FIR dot-product datapath that multiplies each delayed sample by its coefficient and accumulates products in tap order.
sub_modules.fp32_mul: Combinational binary32 multiply wrapper used by the FIR datapath.
sub_modules.fp32_add: Combinational binary32 add wrapper used by the FIR accumulation chain.
